query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS saved_protocols (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  question TEXT NOT NULL,
  response LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  tags VARCHAR(500),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user t869jKPZZM2MBJ1.root --database KRXaH85wcMhcPUe76G3pNQ --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS saved_protocols (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  question TEXT NOT NULL,
  response LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
  tags VARCHAR(500),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
